title: Tunisian Meat Brik
description: A traditional Tunisian dish featuring a crispy brik pastry filled with spiced meat, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out squares of pastry, about 3 inches per side.
In a bowl, mix together ground meat, chopped onion, minced garlic, Tunisian spice mix, salt, and pepper.
Place a tablespoon of the meat mixture in the center of each pastry square.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg.
Fold the pastry in half to form a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the brik with the remaining egg.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
